documentation.summary: Documentation for the client application package.

documentation.name: CLAUDE.md
documentation.summary: Contributor guidance for the Journey to Recovery monorepo, covering commands, architecture, testing conventions, environment configuration, and deployment operations.

documentation.summary: Project handoff for the completed risk-escalation pipeline, documenting alert flow, review fixes, operational gotchas, and outstanding manual verification work.

infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs the evaluation gate for proposed changes.

infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that promotes an approved evaluation baseline.

data.name: migration.sql
data.summary: Creates the server database schema for accounts, recovery tracking, chat, and alerts.

data.name: migration_001.sql
data.summary: Adds the chat-goals table through an incremental database migration.

data.name: user
data.summary: Stores user accounts and rehabilitation profile fields.

data.name: refresh_token
data.summary: Stores refresh tokens associated with user sessions.

data.name: goal
data.summary: Stores user recovery goals and SMART-goal details.

data.name: messages
data.summary: Stores messages belonging to chatbot conversations.

data.name: chat_goals
data.summary: Stores goals extracted from chatbot conversations.

data.name: alerts
data.summary: Stores wellbeing risk alerts generated for users.

config.summary: Base TypeScript configuration for the client package.

config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the server package.

config.summary: Stores baseline chatbot evaluation metrics used for comparison in CI.

config.name: .env.example
config.summary: Documents the server environment variables for local MySQL, JWT signing, AI providers, runtime settings, email digests, and Railway production deployment.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Defines the Bun-based Express server package, its API and database dependencies, and commands for development, tests, evaluation workflows, and daily email digests.

list.name: Client Experience
list.description: The React application, including recovery workflows, authentication screens, routing, shared UI primitives, styling, and client-side integrations.

list.name: Server Application
list.description: The Express API implementation, covering routes, domain operations, request validation, integrations, and operational jobs for the recovery platform.

list.name: Data Layer
list.description: SQL migrations and database table definitions that persist accounts, recovery activity, conversations, goals, and clinician alerts.

list.name: Quality & Evaluation
list.description: Server tests, test fixtures, evaluation runners, and scenario datasets that validate APIs and chatbot quality.

list.name: Configuration & Tooling
list.description: Repository and package settings, build tooling, environment templates, and analysis configuration that support local development and releases.

list.name: Documentation
list.description: Repository and package documentation covering architecture, contribution practices, handoff context, and server usage.

list.name: CI/CD
list.description: GitHub Actions workflows that gate evaluations and promote approved baselines.

function:packages/server/tests/evaluatio.name: main
function:packages/server/tests/evaluatio.summary: Reads evaluation data and produces aggregated metrics.

file:packages/client/src/shared/routing/.name: routes.tsx
file:packages/client/src/shared/routing/.summary: Defines the client-side browser router for authentication, protected recovery workflows, clinician alerts, and the application's guided self-assessment pages.

file:packages/server/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/server/index.ts.summary: Bootstraps the Express API server, configuring CORS, JSON and cookie middleware before mounting the application's route modules under /api.

file:packages/server/routes/alertRoutes..name: alertRoutes.ts
file:packages/server/routes/alertRoutes..summary: Defines clinician-protected alert endpoints for listing open and historical alerts, fetching details, and acknowledging or resolving alert records.

file:packages/server/utilities/schema.ts.name: schema.ts
file:packages/server/utilities/schema.ts.summary: Exports Zod validation schemas and inferred input types for authentication, profile, check-in, goal, wellness, chat, and clinician alert update requests.

file:packages/client/src/shared/componen.name: NavBar.tsx
file:packages/client/src/shared/componen.summary: Renders the persistent client navigation bar with route-aware links and a clinician-only alerts indicator. It refreshes the alert count when the clinician or route changes.

function:packages/client/src/shared/comp.name: NavBar
function:packages/client/src/shared/comp.summary: Builds the route navigation controls and conditionally retrieves and displays the clinician alert count.

file:packages/server/tests/routes/_testU.name: _testUtils.ts
file:packages/server/tests/routes/_testU.summary: Provides shared Bun test scaffolding: mocked database and OpenAI clients, a fully wired Express application, and authentication helpers for server route tests.

file:packages/server/tests/routes/alert..name: alert.test.ts
file:packages/server/tests/routes/alert..summary: Exercises clinician alert endpoints, covering authorization, alert retrieval, status transitions, validation, and database failure responses.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: startServer
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Starts the shared Express application on an ephemeral port and returns the server with its base URL for HTTP tests.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: stopServer
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Closes a test HTTP server and resolves or rejects according to the close callback result.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: signTestAccessToken
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Creates a one-day JWT access token using the test access-secret environment setting.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: signTestRefreshToken
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Creates a seven-day JWT refresh token using the test refresh-secret environment setting.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: authCookie
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Builds the access-token cookie header used to authenticate route-test requests.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: decodeAccessTokenCookie
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Extracts and decodes the access-token value from a Set-Cookie response header for assertions.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: mockAuthOk
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Queues an empty blacklist-query result so a request is treated as authenticated and not revoked.

function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.name: resetMocks
function:packages/server/tests/routes/_t.summary: Clears all shared database, connection, AI, and transaction mocks between route test cases.

document:CLAUDE.md.name: CLAUDE.md
document:CLAUDE.md.summary: Contributor guidance for the Journey to Recovery monorepo, covering commands, architecture, testing conventions, environment configuration, and deployment operations.

document:HANDOFF.md.name: HANDOFF.md
document:HANDOFF.md.summary: Project handoff for the completed risk-escalation pipeline, documenting alert flow, review fixes, operational gotchas, and outstanding manual verification work.

config:packages/server/.env.example.name: .env.example
config:packages/server/.env.example.summary: Documents the server environment variables for local MySQL, JWT signing, AI providers, runtime settings, email digests, and Railway production deployment.

config:packages/server/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/server/package.json.summary: Defines the Bun-based Express server package, its API and database dependencies, and commands for development, tests, evaluation workflows, and daily email digests.

function:packages/client/src/lib/utils.t.name: cn
function:packages/client/src/lib/utils.t.summary: Combines conditional class names and merges Tailwind CSS utility conflicts.

file:packages/server/scripts/daily-diges.name: daily-digest.ts
file:packages/server/scripts/daily-diges.summary: Queries open risk alerts and emails a daily HTML digest to clinician accounts via Resend.
